sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43609" key="eu)deipni/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐδειπν-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n43609.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">feast offered to departed souls</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1388.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Harmod.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. sq. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1388.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
